## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] `swift build` succeeds locally.
- [ ] `swift test` passes locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes (offline/deterministic).
- [ ] Any new user-facing error conforms to `LocalizedError` per [docs/ENGINEERING_RULES.md](../docs/ENGINEERING_RULES.md).
- [ ] I tested library-mutating changes against a **disposable** Serato library, not my primary one.
